reason: Check agents should start from the backend package spec index.
Verify search cache refactors preserve planner decisions, query semantics, and warm-load behavior.
Verify disk cache fingerprinting and persistence remain compatible with SQLite file behavior.
Best-effort cache failures must remain non-fatal and not mask search behavior regressions.
Search warm-load/debug logging should stay structured and non-invasive.
Check agents must enforce build, unit, strict concurrency, and relevant performance gates.
